response.justification: While Bogdan has a solid engineering background as an individual contributor with strong distributed systems expertise, he lacks the executive leadership experience required for a CTO role. The resume shows no evidence of scaling engineering organizations, managing technical leaders, or architecting high-stakes, multi-agent AI systems for complex fintech environments.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise, including building microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Solid software craftsmanship background emphasizing TDD, CI/CD, and event-driven architectures.
concerns: Complete lack of executive-level engineering leadership or experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
No proven track record of architecting and operating stateful, multi-agent AI systems in production financial environments.
Missing experience in managing hybrid engineering models, outsourced teams, and defining company-wide technical roadmaps.
